name: @yappaflow/builder
description: Yappaflow's in-house site builder — the agency-facing surface where AI-assembled SiteProjects get tweaked before CMS export. Phase 7 ships a placeholder so the Vercel project, subdomain, and cookie-scope plumbing can be verified in advance. Phase 8 replaces this with the real editor (iframe canvas, section library, Tiptap, Zustand, GSAP).
